untranslatable_reason: Signal requires TED spread and Beta Spread indicators which are not in the allowed indicator list. TED spread (3-month LIBOR minus 3-month T-bill rate) and ex-ante Beta Spread (βS - βL) / βS are specialized financial indicators not available in the standard price-action/technical indicator set. The closest proxy (india_vix) is inadequate for this factor-based credit-regime signal.
translation_notes: This is a factor-based macro signal dependent on credit market indicators (TED spread) and cross-sectional beta calculations that fall outside the scope of technical indicators. Proper implementation requires access to real-time TED spread data and factor-specific beta computations. A backtest engine would need custom data feeds for this signal.
